text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Israeli jets over Beirut and its suburbs. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli jets break the sound barrier over the Bekaa area at a very low altitude. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 以色列战机飞越贝鲁特及其郊区。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列战机在贝卡地区超低空飞行并突破音障。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 Daraa24: Two people were killed and seven others injured in explosions at an explosives and weapons warehouse in the Al-Ghazzali compound on the Daraa–Damascus highway, according to a medical source. The victims and injured were transported to a hospital in the city of Izraa. Unconfirmed reports suggest the incident may have been caused by an Israeli strike, though this has not been independently verified. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 Daraa24：据医疗消息来源称，大马士革至德拉高速公路旁 Al-Ghazzali 大院内的一个爆炸物和武器仓库发生爆炸，造成两人死亡，七人受伤。死伤者已被送往伊兹拉市的一家医院。未经证实的报道称，此次事件可能是由以色列的空袭引起的，但这尚未得到独立核实。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🎪 🤡 🇮🇷 The Democrats War Powers Resolution , aimed at blocking President Trump from continuing Operation Epstein's Fury, has failed in the House by a vote of 213–214 . 🐻 WWE/Kardashians/OF/Grinder mash-up show, aka "US politics", continues. Pure cinema. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🎪 🤡 🇮🇷 旨在阻止特朗普总统继续“爱泼斯坦之怒”行动的民主党《战争权力决议案》，在众议院以 213 票对 214 票的结果未获通过。🐻 WWE/卡戴珊/OF/Grinder 混合秀，又名“美国政治”，仍在继续。纯粹的电影感。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Bizzare Russian frankenstein. T-14 Armata tank turret installed on the BMP IFV chassis. Not sure why. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2044817637021028404/video/1 tweet

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : A man who filmed an F-15 crash in Kuwait has been jailed since March 2, and his X and Instagram accounts have been taken down. His arrest comes amid a broader wave in which hundreds have been detained for filming similar incidents, with critics calling it a crackdown on dissent. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044184652227764537/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @TheWarMonitor：一名拍摄了科威特 F-15 坠机事件的男子自 3 月 2 日起被监禁，他的 X 和 Instagram 账号已被注销。他的被捕发生在一场更广泛的浪潮中，数百人因拍摄类似事件而被拘留，批评者称这是对异议的镇压。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044184652227764537/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated NATO Secretary General Rutte stated that Putin's victory is now a distant dream. He understands that the Russian economy is in a dire state. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2044817413196169673/video/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Albanian PM Edi Rama again delivered his signature one-knee greeting to Italian PM Giorgia Meloni at Palazzo Chigi meeting. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044817158861996161/video/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel TOTAL BLUNDER. DISASTER. GIVING LIFE TO HEZBOLLAH. IRAN IS NOW CONTROLLING HOW ISRAEL BEHAVES IN LEBANON. THIS IS A BIG MISTAKE. Trump: I just had excellent conversations with the Highly Respected President Joseph Aoun, of Lebanon, and Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu, of Israel. These two Leaders have agreed that in order to achieve PEACE between their Countries, they will formally begin a 10 Day CEASEFIRE at 5 P.M. EST. On Tuesday, the two Countries met for the first time in 34 years here in Washington, D.C., with our Great Secretary of State, Marco Rubio. I have directed Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Rubio, together with the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, Dan Razin' Caine, to work with Israel and Lebanon to achieve a Lasting PEACE. It has been my Honor to solve 9 Wars across the World, and this will be my 10th, so let's, GET IT DONE! President DONALD J. TRUMP - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 彻底的失误。灾难。给真主党注入了生命。伊朗现在正在控制以色列在黎巴嫩的行为。这是一个巨大的错误。特朗普：我刚刚与黎巴嫩受人尊敬的约瑟夫·奥恩总统和以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡进行了极好的交谈。这两位领导人一致认为，为了实现两国之间的和平，他们将正式开始为期 10 天的停火，时间从美东时间下午 5 点开始。周二，两国 34 年来首次在这里，即华盛顿特区，与我们伟大的国务卿马可·卢比奥会面。我已指示副总统 JD·万斯和国务卿卢比奥，与参谋长联席会议主席丹·拉辛·凯恩一起，与以色列和黎巴嫩合作，实现持久和平。我有幸解决了世界各地的 9 场战争，这将是我的第 10 场，所以让我们把它完成吧！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: WarMonitor Army Secretary Dan Driscoll is being questioned in Congress after clashing with the Defense Secretary over the abrupt firing of senior Army leaders during an active war. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044816686734299184/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 陆军部长丹·德里斯科尔在与国防部长就战争期间突然解雇高级陆军领导人发生冲突后，正在国会接受质询。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044816686734299184/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel I’m sorry. Israel and Lebanon were never at war. Netanyahu shoudl have announced this, not president Trump. This is a major win for the Islamic regime, and Hezbollah. This is not what the people of Israel wanted. They want to finish up Hezbollah already. Trump: I just had excellent conversations with the Highly Respected President Joseph Aoun, of Lebanon, and Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu, of Israel. These two Leaders have agreed that in order to achieve PEACE between their Countries, they will formally begin a 10 Day CEASEFIRE at 5 P.M. EST. On Tuesday, the two Countries met for the first time in 34 years here in Washington, D.C., with our Great Secretary of State, Marco Rubio. I have directed Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Rubio, together with the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, Dan Razin' Caine, to work with Israel and Lebanon to achieve a Lasting PEACE. It has been my Honor to solve 9 Wars across the World, and this will be my 10th, so let's, GET IT DONE! President DONALD J. TRUMP - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel 很抱歉。以色列和黎巴嫩从未处于战争状态。内塔尼亚胡应该宣布这一点，而不是特朗普总统。这对伊斯兰政权和真主党来说是一个重大胜利。这不是以色列人民想要的。他们想彻底解决真主党。特朗普：我刚刚与黎巴嫩受人尊敬的约瑟夫·奥恩总统和以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡进行了极好的交谈。这两位领导人一致认为，为了实现两国之间的和平，他们将正式开始为期 10 天的停火，时间从美东时间下午 5 点开始。周二，两国 34 年来首次在这里，即华盛顿特区，与我们伟大的国务卿马可·卢比奥会面。我已指示副总统 JD·万斯和国务卿卢比奥，与参谋长联席会议主席丹·拉辛·凯恩一起，与以色列和黎巴嫩合作，实现持久和平。我有幸解决了世界各地的 9 场战争，这将是我的第 10 场，所以让我们把它完成吧！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @NadavPollak : I think that a ceasefire is a positive development but several quick thoughts: 1. Insane that Israelis hear on a ceasefire from Trump and not Bibi. 2. This is not the end of the war as Trump put it. The underlying reasons for escalation are still here. 3. It appears that Trump might be giving Iran a small win here by announcing a ceasefire as they wanted. 4. Anyone still thinks that Trump does what Bibi wishes? Bibi really didn’t want this ceasefire and still Trump decided to do it. 5. Bibi has several problems politically now - he promised to defeat Hezbollah (he did not). He promised to remove the Iranian threat (he did not, yet). Elections are soon and Bibi is in a bind 🚨 🚨 Trump on Truth Social: I just had excellent conversations with the Highly Respected President Joseph Aoun, of Lebanon, and Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu, of Israel. These two Leaders have agreed that in order to achieve PEACE between their Countries, they will formally begin a 10 Day CEASEFIRE at 5 P.M. EST. On Tuesday, the two Countries met for the first time in 34 years here in Washington, D.C., with our Great Secretary of State, Marco Rubio. I have directed Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Rubio, together with the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, Dan Razin' Caine, to work with Israel and Lebanon to achieve a Lasting PEACE. It has been my Honor to solve 9 Wars across the World, and this will be my 10th, so let's, GET IT DONE! - Barak Ravid tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @NadavPollak：我认为停火是一个积极的发展，但有几个快速的想法：1. 以色列人从特朗普而不是比比那里听到停火的消息，这太疯狂了。2. 这并不是特朗普所说的战争结束。升级的根本原因仍然存在。3. 看起来特朗普可能通过宣布停火给了伊朗一个小小的胜利，正如他们所愿。4. 还有人认为特朗普会做比比希望的事吗？比比真的不想要这次停火，但特朗普还是决定这么做。5. 比比现在在政治上有几个问题——他承诺击败真主党（他没有做到）。他承诺消除伊朗威胁（他还没有做到）。选举即将到来，比比陷入了困境 🚨 🚨 特朗普在 Truth Social 上写道：我刚刚与黎巴嫩受人尊敬的约瑟夫·奥恩总统和以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡进行了极好的交谈。这两位领导人一致认为，为了实现两国之间的和平，他们将正式开始为期 10 天的停火，时间从美东时间下午 5 点开始。周二，两国 34 年来首次在这里，即华盛顿特区，与我们伟大的国务卿马可·卢比奥会面。我已指示副总统 JD·万斯和国务卿卢比奥，与参谋长联席会议主席丹·拉辛·凯恩一起，与以色列和黎巴嫩合作，实现持久和平。我有幸解决了世界各地的 9 场战争，这将是我的第 10 场，所以让我们把它完成吧！ - Barak Ravid 推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanon Reports: Israeli airstrikes hitting multiple towns in southern Lebanon ahead of the ceasefire taking effect. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 黎巴嫩报道：在停火生效前，以色列空袭了黎巴嫩南部的多个城镇。推文

text: Open Source Intel Worth noting that Hezbollah leader said he would not respect a ceasefire. As far as I’m concerned, Israel isn’t at war with Lebanon. Israel is at war with the Hezbollah terror organization operating from Hezbollah controlled areas in Lebanon. I don’t see any reason for an Israeli ceasefire with “Lebanon” if there is no war, and I don’t see any reason for a ceasefire with Hezbollah based on the Islamic regime’s demands. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 值得注意的是，真主党领导人表示他不会遵守停火协议。就我而言，以色列并没有与黎巴嫩开战。以色列是在与在黎巴嫩真主党控制区活动的真主党恐怖组织开战。如果根本没有战争，我不认为以色列有任何理由与“黎巴嫩”停火，我也不认为有任何理由基于伊斯兰政权的要求与真主党停火。 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israeli official to the Jerusalem Post: The IDF will continue to maintain its positions and areas in southern Lebanon where it is currently deployed during the ceasefire. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列官员对《耶路撒冷邮报》表示：在停火期间，以色列国防军将继续保持其目前在黎巴嫩南部的阵地和区域。推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah MP Hassan Fadlallah to Al Mayadeen: "We learned today from the Iranian ambassador in Beirut that Iranian efforts led to a comprehensive ceasefire in Lebanon. The American side undertook to inform the Prime Minister of Israel of this decision." "The renewal of Iran's negotiations with the USA is conditional on the implementation of this commitment." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 真主党议员哈桑·法德拉拉对“广场电视台”表示：“我们今天从伊朗驻贝鲁特大使那里得知，伊朗的努力促成了黎巴嫩的全面停火。美方承诺将此决定通知以色列总理。”“伊朗与美国恢复谈判的条件是落实这一承诺。”推文

text: Nuno Felix Do it Dima, lets get this over with! Russian Defense Ministry’s statement must be taken literally: the list of European facilities which make drones & other equipment is a list of potential targets for the Russian armed forces. When strikes become a reality depends on what comes next. Sleep well, European partners! - Dmitry Medvedev tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 动手吧迪马，让我们结束这一切！俄罗斯国防部的声明必须按字面意思理解：制造无人机和其他设备的欧洲设施名单是俄罗斯武装部队的潜在目标名单。打击何时成为现实取决于接下来会发生什么。睡个好觉，欧洲伙伴们！ - 德米特里·梅德韦杰夫推文

text: Open Source Intel Israel's cabinet has not held a vote on the Lebanon ceasefire. This as Trump announces a 10-day ceasefire starting at midnight. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列内阁尚未就黎巴嫩停火进行投票。与此同时，特朗普宣布从午夜开始为期 10 天的停火。推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump invites Netanyahu and Lebanon's President to The White House for peace talks, after announcing a 10 day ceasefire beginning today at 5pm EST. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044812436599914673/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 特朗普在宣布从今天美东时间下午 5 点开始为期 10 天的停火后，邀请内塔尼亚胡和黎巴嫩总统前往白宫进行和平谈判。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044812436599914673/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Trump announced a new 10-day ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon on Truth Social as the House voted on the War Powers Act, which ultimately failed. Interesting timing. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 特朗普在 Truth Social 上宣布了以色列和黎巴嫩之间新的 10 天停火协议，当时众议院正在就《战争权力法》进行投票，该法案最终未获通过。时间点很有趣。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @AaronBlake : The pope posted this mere minutes after Hegseth compared press coverage of the Iran war to the Pharisees working against Jesus. Woe to those who manipulate religion and the very name of God for their own military, economic, and political gain, dragging that which is sacred into darkness and filth. #ApostolicJourney #Cameroon https://www.vatican.va/content/leo-xiv/en/events/event.dir.html/content/vaticanevents/en/2026/4/16/camerun-incontro-pace.html - Pope Leo XIV tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @AaronBlake：教皇在赫格塞斯将伊朗战争的新闻报道比作法利赛人反对耶稣之后仅仅几分钟就发布了这条消息。祸哉那些为了自己的军事、经济和政治利益而操纵宗教和上帝之名，将神圣的东西拖入黑暗和污秽中的人。#使徒之旅 #喀麦隆 https://www.vatican.va/content/leo-xiv/en/events/event.dir.html/content/vaticanevents/en/2026/4/16/camerun-incontro-pace.html - 教皇利奥十四世推文

text: 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 According to the Al Mayadeen network, citing Israeli sources, assessments within the Israeli regime suggest that a ceasefire in Lebanon would indicate that Trump has backed down in the face of Iran. The report also notes that a ceasefire in Lebanon was Iran’s primary condition. The recent visits by Pakistani officials to Iran and other Arab countries were part of their ongoing efforts to establish ceasefire in Lebanon in the framework of peace talks between Iran and the United States.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 据援引以色列消息来源的“广场电视台”网络报道，以色列政权内部的评估认为，黎巴嫩停火表明特朗普在伊朗面前退缩了。报道还指出，黎巴嫩停火是伊朗的首要条件。巴基斯坦官员最近对伊朗和其他阿拉伯国家的访问，是他们作为伊朗与美国和平谈判框架内，为在黎巴嫩建立停火所做持续努力的一部分。

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "BREAKING: Trump: I just had excellent conversations with the Highly Respected President Joseph Aoun, of Lebanon, and Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu, of Israel. These two Leaders have agreed that in order to achieve PEACE between their Countries, they will…" The Israel-Lebanon ceasefire will follow a format similar to the one from November 2024, basically giving Israel the authority to conduct attacks in Lebanon whenever it pleases. Source: N12
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“突发：特朗普：我刚刚与备受尊敬的黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）和以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡（Bibi Netanyahu）进行了出色的交谈。这两位领导人一致认为，为了实现两国之间的和平，他们将……” 以色列与黎巴嫩的停火协议将遵循类似于2024年11月的模式，基本上赋予以色列随时在黎巴嫩发动袭击的权力。来源：N12

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 The Israeli cabinet was informed that ground forces are expected to remain in place, while the ceasefire is set to focus on halting aerial strikes. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Channel 12: The ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon will follow the same format as the 2024 version, with Israel retaining freedom of action to respond to "threats". @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列内阁获悉，地面部队预计将留守原地，而停火协议将侧重于停止空袭。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列第12频道：以色列与黎巴嫩之间的停火协议将遵循与2024年版本相同的模式，以色列保留应对“威胁”的行动自由。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 ⚡ Zionists are angry because Trump announces the ceasefire before they get to vote on it.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 ⚡ 犹太复国主义者感到愤怒，因为特朗普在他们投票表决之前就宣布了停火。

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Middle East Spectator — MES: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇱🇧 / 🇮🇱 / 🇮🇷 NEW: The ceasefire in Lebanon was announced by Trump without Israel’s security cabinet approval – Amichai Stein Sources say Pakistani Field Marshal Assim Muneer called President Trump on behalf of Iran and pushed him to declare a ceasefire ahead of a new round of talks in Islamabad. @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Middle East Spectator — MES：— ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇱🇧 / 🇮🇱 / 🇮🇷 最新消息：特朗普在未经以色列安全内阁批准的情况下宣布了黎巴嫩停火协议 —— 阿米海·斯坦（Amichai Stein） 消息人士称，巴基斯坦陆军元帅阿西姆·穆尼尔（Assim Muneer）代表伊朗致电特朗普总统，敦促他在伊斯兰堡新一轮会谈前宣布停火。@Middle_East_Spectator

text: Tucker Carlson on Trump: Here’s a leader who’s mocking the gods of his ancestors, mocking the God of gods, and exalting himself above them. Could this be the Antichrist? Well, who knows?
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森谈特朗普：看看这位领导人，他正在嘲笑他祖先的神，嘲笑万神之神，并将自己凌驾于他们之上。这会是敌基督吗？嗯，谁知道呢？

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli jets over Beirut and its suburbs. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列喷气式飞机飞越贝鲁特及其郊区。 @wfwitness

text: Tucker Carlson: Trump is mocking Jesus. He's making fun of Christianity. The central figure of the religion is being held up for mockery.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森：特朗普正在嘲笑耶稣。他在取笑基督教。该宗教的核心人物正被拿来嘲弄。

text: Open Source Intel The IDF is preparing for increased rocket fire from Lebanon until the ceasefire takes effect. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：以色列国防军正准备应对来自黎巴嫩的火箭弹袭击增加，直到停火协议生效。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) US President Trump announced that Israel and Lebanon agreed on a 10-day ceasefire following phone calls he held with Lebanon's President Aoun and Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu. Trump also informed that he is inviting the two leaders to the White House for the first meaningful talks between Israel and Lebanon since 1983. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）：美国总统特朗普宣布，在与黎巴嫩总统奥恩和以色列总理内塔尼亚胡通电话后，以色列和黎巴嫩同意停火10天。特朗普还表示，他将邀请这两位领导人前往白宫，进行自1983年以来以色列和黎巴嫩之间首次有意义的会谈。推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 Lebanese PM Nawaf Salam welcomes Trump's ceasefire announcement, calling it "a central Lebanese demand we have strived for since the first day of the war" and the primary goal of Tuesday's Washington meeting. Salam thanked the U.S., France, EU states, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Qatar, and Jordan for their efforts. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：刚刚 🔴 黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆对特朗普的停火声明表示欢迎，称这是“我们自战争第一天起就一直努力争取的黎巴嫩核心诉求”，也是周二华盛顿会议的主要目标。萨拉姆感谢美国、法国、欧盟国家、沙特阿拉伯、埃及、卡塔尔和约旦所做的努力。推文

text: OSINTtechnical Israeli officials were reportedly “outraged” that Trump announced a Lebanon ceasefire before they held a Security Cabinet vote -i24 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：据报道，以色列官员对特朗普在他们举行安全内阁投票前就宣布黎巴嫩停火感到“愤怒” -i24 推文

text: WarMonitor Pete Hegseth is now comparing the media to the Pharisees who opposed Jesus, using biblical language to dismiss criticism of Trump as biased attacks. Big "holy war" vibes from Pete Hegseth this morning, insinuating that doubting Trump is like doubting Christ https://twitter.com/brianstelter/status/2044762882492010814/video/1 - Brian Stelter tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：皮特·赫格塞斯现在将媒体比作反对耶稣的法利赛人，使用圣经语言来驳斥对特朗普的批评，称其为偏见攻击。皮特·赫格塞斯今天早上散发出浓厚的“圣战”气息，暗示怀疑特朗普就像怀疑基督一样 https://twitter.com/brianstelter/status/2044762882492010814/video/1 - 布莱恩·斯特尔特推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump has stated that following today’s announced ceasefire, he will be inviting the Prime Minister of Israel, Benjamin Netanyahu, and the President of Lebanon, Joseph Aoun, to the White House for the “first meaningful talks between Israel and Lebanon since 1983.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普表示，在今天宣布停火后，他将邀请以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡和黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩前往白宫，进行“自1983年以来以色列和黎巴嫩之间首次有意义的会谈”。推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @ColbyBadhwar : 720 per year. By contrast, Lockheed Martin has production capacity for 400 PrSMs per year, although actual deliveries are below that as Full Rate Production has not yet started. Capacity for 500/y ATACMS as well. https://twitter.com/ColbyBadhwar/status/2044807336103944242/photo/1 “Moscow is producing about 60 Iskander missiles a month and has expanded its launcher capacity” https://www.ft.com/content/d47abaa2-8cfc-48eb-a996-909580b8c816?shareType=nongift - Nicole Grajewski tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：转发 @ColbyBadhwar ：每年720枚。相比之下，洛克希德·马丁公司每年有400枚PrSM的生产能力，尽管实际交付量低于此数字，因为全面生产尚未开始。ATACMS的产能也为每年500枚。https://twitter.com/ColbyBadhwar/status/2044807336103944242/photo/1 “莫斯科每月生产约60枚伊斯坎德尔导弹，并扩大了其发射装置产能” https://www.ft.com/content/d47abaa2-8cfc-48eb-a996-909580b8c816?shareType=nongift - 妮可·格拉耶夫斯基推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: I will be inviting the Prime Minister of Israel, Bibi Netanyahu, and the President of Lebanon, Joseph Aoun, to the White House for the first meaningful talks between Israel and Lebanon since 1983, a very long time ago. Both sides want to see PEACE, and I believe that will happen, quickly! tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：特朗普：我将邀请以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡和黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩前往白宫，进行自1983年（那是很久以前了）以来以色列和黎巴嫩之间首次有意义的会谈。双方都希望看到和平，我相信这会很快实现！推文

text: Faytuks News Israeli officials and channels are increasingly frustrated with what they deem to be Trump dictating Israeli policy without keeping them in the loop 🚨 🚨 Israeli ministers outraged during the security cabinet meeting: Trump announces Israel’s consent to a ceasefire before Security Cabinet approval. - Amichai Stein tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News：以色列官员和频道对特朗普在不通知他们的情况下主导以色列政策的行为感到越来越沮丧 🚨 🚨 以色列部长们在安全内阁会议上感到愤怒：特朗普在安全内阁批准之前就宣布了以色列同意停火。 - 阿米查伊·斯坦推文

text: Instant News Alerts Trump announces 10-day ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon and says he will convene summit at the White House between Israel and Lebanese leaders. (Axios) tweet
text_zh: 即时新闻快讯：特朗普宣布以色列和黎巴嫩停火10天，并表示将在白宫召集以色列和黎巴嫩领导人峰会。（Axios）推文

text: Faytuks News Breaking: Trump says he will invite Israel's prime minister Netanyahu and Lebanon's president Aoun to the White House for talks https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2044808029464301907/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News：突发：特朗普表示将邀请以色列总理内塔尼亚胡和黎巴嫩总统奥恩前往白宫进行会谈 https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2044808029464301907/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Army Secretary Dan Driscoll ordered the shutdown of multiple Army-affiliated social media accounts after a post praising Democratic Sen. Tammy Duckworth’s military service sparked backlash from conservative voices. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：陆军部长丹·德里斯科尔下令关闭多个陆军附属社交媒体账户，此前一篇赞扬民主党参议员塔米·达克沃斯军事服役经历的帖子引发了保守派声音的强烈反对。推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump has announced that after talks today with President Joseph Aoun, of Lebanon, and Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu, of Israel, following rare direct negotiations this week between the two countries, they have agreed to a 10-day ceasefire beginning Thursday at 5:00PM Eastern Time. Presidency Trump adds that he has instructed Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Rubio, together with the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Gen. Dan Caine, to “work with Israel and Lebanon to achieve a Lasting PEACE.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普宣布，在今天与黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩和以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡进行会谈，并经过本周两国之间罕见的直接谈判后，他们已同意从东部时间周四下午5:00开始停火10天。特朗普总统补充说，他已指示副总统JD·万斯和国务卿卢比奥，与参谋长联席会议主席丹·凯恩将军一起，“与以色列和黎巴嫩合作，实现持久和平。”推文

text: OSINTtechnical The aircraft carrier USS Dwight D. Eisenhower (CVN-69) suffered a fire in port this week while undergoing maintenance. Three sailors were injured in what the Navy called a “small fire that was immediately contained.” https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044806326585299201/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：航空母舰“德怀特·D·艾森豪威尔”号（CVN-69）本周在港口进行维护时发生火灾。海军称这是一场“立即被扑灭的小火”，有三名水手受伤。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044806326585299201/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah lawmaker Hassan Fadlallah: "We were informed by Iran's ambassador in Beirut that a one-week ceasefire could begin this evening." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：真主党议员哈桑·法德拉拉：“我们从伊朗驻贝鲁特大使那里获悉，为期一周的停火可能于今晚开始。”推文

text: WarMonitor Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth recited a fake Bible verse during a Pentagon prayer event that was actually a quote from the movie Pulp Fiction. https://x.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2044774310556966938/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯在五角大楼的一次祈祷活动中背诵了一段伪造的圣经经文，实际上那是电影《低俗小说》中的台词。https://x.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2044774310556966938/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: I just had excellent conversations with the Highly Respected President Joseph Aoun, of Lebanon, and Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu, of Israel. These two Leaders have agreed that in order to achieve PEACE between their Countries, they will formally begin a 10 Day CEASEFIRE at 5 P.M. EST. On Tuesday, the two Countries met for the first time in 34 years here in Washington, D.C., with our Great Secretary of State, Marco Rubio. I have directed Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Rubio, together with the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, Dan Razin' Caine, to work with Israel and Lebanon to achieve a Lasting PEACE. It has been my Honor to solve 9 Wars across the World, and this will be my 10th, so let's, GET IT DONE! President DONALD J. TRUMP tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：特朗普：我刚刚与备受尊敬的黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩和以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡进行了出色的交谈。这两位领导人一致认为，为了实现两国之间的和平，他们将正式开始为期10天的停火，时间为东部标准时间下午5点。周二，两国在华盛顿特区与我们伟大的国务卿马可·卢比奥进行了34年来的首次会面。我已指示副总统JD·万斯和国务卿卢比奥，与参谋长联席会议主席丹·拉津·凯恩一起，与以色列和黎巴嫩合作，实现持久和平。我有幸解决了世界各地的9场战争，这将是我的第10场，所以让我们完成它！总统唐纳德·J·特朗普 推文

text: The Trump administration canceled an $11M contract with Catholic Charities in Miami that housed unaccompanied migrant children. The move comes amid tensions between Trump and Pope Leo XIV over issues like migration and U.S. foreign policy. Source: Miami Herald
text_zh: 特朗普政府取消了与迈阿密天主教慈善机构的一份价值1100万美元的合同，该机构负责安置无人陪伴的移民儿童。此举正值特朗普与教皇利奥十四世在移民和美国外交政策等问题上关系紧张之际。来源：迈阿密先驱报

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 An Israeli security official said the military has no plans to withdraw forces from southern Lebanon during any ceasefire. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli cabinet was informed that ground forces are expected to remain in place, while the ceasefire is set to focus on halting aerial strikes. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 一位以色列安全官员表示，军方没有计划在任何停火期间从黎巴嫩南部撤军。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列内阁获悉，地面部队预计将留在原地，而停火将集中在停止空袭上。 @wfwitness
